emails.subject: RE: Offline Agreements
emails.body: RE: Offline Agreements Kay-- These agreements pertain to telecom deals that are currently dormant. Stephanie P.S. When sending email to our group, please be sure to send messages to "Mark S. Palmer", as "the other" Mark Palmer is a VP in the PR department. Thank you!
